message:
feat(tui): major TUI overhaul — responsive layout, rich detail pane, and golden snapshot tests

Layout (layout.rs):
- Redesign responsive breakpoint system with small/medium/large thresholds
  that adapt list-to-detail ratio based on terminal width
- Add proper constraint-based area allocation for search, list, detail,
  and status regions

App (app.rs):
- Implement keyboard-driven detail pane navigation (j/k scroll, tab to
  switch focus between list and detail)
- Add detail pane content rendering with process metadata, evidence
  summary, and planned action display
- Wire up theme-aware styling throughout all panes

Widgets:
- Significantly expand process_detail.rs with structured sections for
  identity, classification, resource usage, evidence items, and action
  plan — each with proper block borders and themed styling
- Enhance process_table.rs with column-aware sorting, selection state
  management, and viewport-aware scrolling
- Update widget module exports

Tests:
- Add TUI golden snapshot test harness (tui_golden.rs) for regression
  testing rendered terminal output across breakpoints

Also update beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
